# Mid-Revision Routing Fixture

## Paper Identity

- **Slug:** mid-revision-routing
- **Title:** Platform Review Cycle Memo
- **Purpose:** decision_memo
- **Channel:** internal
- **Risk:** internal_high
- **Complexity:** standard
- **Audience shape:** prioritized_multi

## Current State

This fixture models a paper that reached review, but fact-check determined that one draft claim needs refreshed research before revision continues.

## Privacy Boundary

The fixture uses synthetic operating data and source identifiers only. It must not contain real person names, company names, employer names, job titles, local paths, or private source material.
